mapper.select: SELECT * FROM internal_tasks ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT * FROM internal_tasks WHERE job_id = #{jobId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO internal_tasks (title, body, status, creator_id, assignee_id, due_time, show_on_calendar, job_id, version) VALUES (#{title}, #{body}, #{status}, #{creatorId}, #{assigneeId}, #{dueTime}, #{showOnCalendar}, #{jobId}, 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE internal_tasks SET due_time = #{dueTime}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
